home.hero_desc: Don't just hold crypto. Put it to work with AI 'Digital Managers' that automatically protect your funds and maximize your earnings on Uniswap v4.
home.problem_subtitle: Traditional liquidity pools can't think. They lose money because they don't react to market changes.
home.problem_1_desc: When market volatility spikes, fixed fees are too low to compensate for the risk. LPs silently lose value to arbitrageurs.
home.problem_2_desc: When prices move, liquidity providers often end up with less value than if they had just held their tokens. Nobody protects them.
home.problem_3_desc: Individual liquidity providers have no tools to compete with institutional bots that exploit static pool settings.
home.features_title: Three Layers of Protection, Fully On-Chain
home.feature_1_desc: Our AI agents analyze market conditions every 12 seconds and automatically set the optimal trading fee. More volatile market = higher fee = more protection.
home.feature_2_desc: Pay a small 10 USDC premium when you add liquidity. If you exit with more than 2% impermanent loss, the insurance pool compensates you automatically.
home.feature_3_desc: Every AI decision is recorded on IPFS before it executes on-chain. You can verify exactly why any fee was changed, at any time.
home.feature_4_desc: Start protecting your pool for a one-time fee of ~$5 (0.00244 ETH). No complex setup. Works with any Uniswap v4 pool.
home.step_1_desc: Add liquidity to any Uniswap v4 pool that uses HookMind. You are automatically enrolled in the AI protection system.
home.step_2_desc: HookMind AI agents read on-chain market data every 12 seconds and calculate the optimal fee to protect your position.
home.step_3_desc: When the AI detects volatility, it instantly raises fees to protect LPs. When markets stabilize, fees return to normal to attract more volume.
home.step_4_desc: When you remove liquidity, if your loss exceeds 2%, the IL Insurance pool automatically calculates and sends your compensation.
home.quote_desc: HookMind combines AI-driven fee management with on-chain insurance to create the safest liquidity pools on Uniswap v4. Every decision is verifiable. Every payout is automatic. No trust required.
home.dev_sdk_desc: Integrate HookMind into your DeFi app. Access real-time fee data, insurance status, and AI signals via REST API and the Uniswap Trading API.
home.mcp_tools_desc: Connect HookMind to Claude or Cursor AI. Ask your assistant about pool health, fees, and protection status directly in your editor.
home.neural_ui_desc: Monitor all protected pools, live fee changes, insurance fund balance, and AI agent activity in one place.
home.cta_desc: Join liquidity providers on Uniswap v4 who trust HookMind to protect their positions. Activate for ~$5 and let AI do the work.

agents.connect_desc: Your AI agent dashboard is waiting. Connect your wallet and pay the one-time $5 activation fee to start protecting your liquidity.
agents.console_desc: Monitor your AI agent's decisions and the liquidity pools it is protecting. Wallet:

leaderboard.hero_desc: Ranking of the most active AI agent operators by decisions made and accuracy on Unichain.
leaderboard.stats_update_info: Your stats update in real time. Activate your agent to start climbing the leaderboard.
leaderboard.climb_info: → Make more AI decisions to rank higher! ⚡
leaderboard.run_daemon_info: Run your agent node to process more pool data and generate more decisions.

builder.title: Strategy Builder
builder.subtitle: Custom Logic
builder.export_success: Strategy exported. Drop the JSON into your agent config.
builder.deployed_desc: Your strategy is now live on Unichain.

pools.hero_desc: Uniswap v4 pools with AI-managed fees and impermanent loss insurance.

strategies.hero_desc: Ready-to-use AI strategies built for different market conditions. Activate one and let the AI manage your pool automatically.
strategies.toast_extreme_warn: ⚠️ "{name}" is an EXTREME risk strategy. Confirm in wallet.

descriptions.peg_keeper: Built for stable pairs (USDC/USDT). Keeps fees low and steady. Ideal for low-risk liquidity providers.
descriptions.delta_opt: Continuously adjusts fees based on rolling volatility windows. Balances fee income and LP protection.
descriptions.vol_shield: Detects volatility spikes and instantly raises fees to protect LP capital. High protection, lower volume.
descriptions.mev_extractor: Maximizes fee capture during high-activity periods. Requires higher risk tolerance.

plugins.hero_desc: Add specialized data sources and features to your AI agent. Each extension improves decision quality.
plugins.toast_success: Extension active! Your agent now has enhanced capabilities.

descriptions.pyth: Real-time price feeds for 100+ assets. Used for accurate volatility calculation.
descriptions.mempool: Scans pending transactions to detect large trades before they hit the pool.
descriptions.chainlink: Cross-chain price synchronization for consistent fee decisions.
descriptions.guardrail: Tracks fee rejections and alerts when the AI hits safety limits.
descriptions.hedger: Automatically scales insurance capacity when IL exposure rises.
descriptions.rug: Analyzes liquidity removal patterns. Pauses agent if suspicious activity is detected.
descriptions.epoch: Optimizes insurance premium collection timing across 7-day epochs.
descriptions.compound: Automatically reinvests earned fees to grow the protection pool.
descriptions.circle: Accept USDC for insurance premiums and activation fees. Supports CCTP cross-chain.
descriptions.telegram: Sends real-time alerts about fee changes and IL events to your Telegram.
descriptions.discord: Rich event notifications for Discord communities and protocol operators.
descriptions.pnl: Calculates your net earnings after fees, impermanent loss, and insurance payouts.

skills.hero_desc: AI Skills give your agent specialized knowledge. Stack multiple skills to improve decision accuracy.
skills.banner_info: Skills expand your agent's knowledge. Stack multiple skills for better protection.
skills.warning_experimental: Experimental: Higher risk in production environments
skills.panel_stack_empty: No skills active. Activate your first AI skill above.

descriptions.vol: Teaches the agent to calculate volatility scores from on-chain price data.
descriptions.il: Predicts impermanent loss exposure before it occurs, allowing proactive fee adjustments.
descriptions.ipfs: Retrieves and verifies the last 5 AI decision logs from IPFS.
descriptions.social: Incorporates social media sentiment into fee decisions during high-publicity events.
descriptions.mev: Identifies MEV bot activity and triggers protective fee spikes in real time.
descriptions.epoch: Optimizes insurance premium collection to maximize the insurance pool balance.
descriptions.macro: Monitors global market conditions (BTC, ETH dominance) to adjust risk thresholds.
descriptions.arb: Scans multiple pools simultaneously to detect and respond to arbitrage opportunities.

footer.description: HookMind protects Uniswap v4 liquidity providers with AI-driven dynamic fees and on-chain impermanent loss insurance. Built on Unichain. Backed by the Uniswap Foundation.

vault.title: Institutional Treasury & Insurance
vault.description: Secure your liquidity with automated risk management. Assets are smoothed over 7-day epochs to ensure predictable, institutional-grade yield.
vault.gateway_desc: Activation registers your agent as a verified operator in the HookMind network, enabling institutional-grade fee management and yield smoothing via Unichain hooks.

overview.desc: HookMind is an AI-powered liquidity protection system built on Uniswap v4 and Unichain. It automatically adjusts trading fees using artificial intelligence and provides on-chain impermanent loss insurance for liquidity providers. Every AI decision is cryptographically signed and permanently recorded on IPFS.

how_it_works.desc_1: Pay a one-time fee of ~$5 (0.00244 ETH) to register your AI agent on-chain via the AgentRegistry contract.
how_it_works.desc_2: Your agent reads on-chain data every 12 seconds, computes a volatility score (0–10000), and signs a fee recommendation with its ECDSA key.
how_it_works.desc_3: HookMindCore.sol verifies the agent signature and updates the Uniswap v4 pool fee in real time. All decisions are logged to IPFS.

overview.rev_card_1_desc: One-time fee to register an AI agent. Revenue scales with operator count.
overview.rev_card_2_desc: LPs pay a small premium when adding liquidity. Premiums grow the insurance pool.
overview.rev_card_3_desc: A 1% software toll on fees generated by HookMind-managed pools funds ongoing development.

quickstart.step_3_desc: Register your agent on Unichain to start protecting your pool:

architecture.layer_1_desc: Node.js agent reads Unichain block data every 12 seconds, computes volatility scores using market data, and sends signed fee recommendations to the smart contract.
architecture.layer_2_desc: Every AI decision is pinned to IPFS via Pinata before execution. The resulting CID serves as an immutable, verifiable record of why the fee was changed.
architecture.layer_3_desc: HookMindCore.sol verifies the ECDSA signature of every agent decision against the AgentRegistry. Invalid or out-of-bounds recommendations are automatically rejected.
architecture.layer_4_desc: Verified decisions update the pool fee in real time via Uniswap v4's beforeSwap hook. The hook also manages IL insurance enrollment and payouts.
architecture.flow_2: AI computes optimal fee and signs recommendation
architecture.flow_3: Decision pinned to IPFS for transparency
architecture.flow_4: Smart contract verifies and applies fee update

contracts.core_desc: The Uniswap v4 Hook. Verifies AI agent signatures and applies dynamic fees via beforeSwap. Manages IL insurance enrollment on afterAddLiquidity.
contracts.registry_desc: Manages AI agent registration and authorization. Agents must be registered here before their signatures are accepted by HookMindCore.
contracts.vault_desc: Collects and manages protocol revenue from activation fees and the 1% software toll.
contracts.insurance_desc: The IL Insurance pool. Holds USDC premiums and processes epoch-based prorated payouts to eligible LPs.
contracts.fees_desc: Tracks fee accounting across all managed pools and epochs.
